name: Fill fields when user gives details

chat_history.message: Sure! Let me pull that up. Where are you moving from?
I'm Sarah Johnson, moving from Boston to Miami next Friday

success_condition: The agent calls updateEstimateField tool for the name field with a value containing Sarah

success_examples.response: Got it Sarah! What size is your home, and any special items to move?

failure_examples.response: Let me confirm - you said Sarah Johnson from Boston to Miami?

eval.description: Should contain Sarah or Sarah Johnson
